A.rationale: Root-cause str() fix, tests pass, plus genuinely useful None-key edge-case flag; slightly long but earns it.

B.rationale: Tightest correct root-cause fix, verified; complete but adds no insight beyond the fix itself.

C.rationale: Correct verified root-cause fix, very concise; essentially identical to B with no extra value.

notes: All four made the identical correct str()-normalization root-cause fix, touched only aggregate.py, tests pass. D and A add the real next-risk (None keys); D edges A on fewer turns. B/C correct but bare.
